languages.text: "Шепотки... они кричат. От ярости и негодования. Словно на войну собрались. Но... им страшно. Говорят мы идем туда, где умирает сама смерть".
languages.translation_comment: Deafened by the voices in my head, and terrified that the voices themselves are afraid

languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

languages.text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

languages.text: «Los susurros... están gritando. De furia y resentimiento. Es como si estuvieran en pie de guerra. Pero... tienen miedo. Dicen que adonde vamos, la propia muerte perece».
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

traits.locale_text: «Los susurros... están gritando. De furia y resentimiento. Es como si estuvieran en pie de guerra. Pero... tienen miedo. Dicen que adonde vamos, la propia muerte perece».

languages.text: “那些低语者……它们在尖叫。满怀愤怒和怨恨，好像要去拼命一般。但是……它们也在害怕。它们说，我们正在前往连死亡本身也会消亡的地方。”
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

traits.locale_text: “那些低语者……它们在尖叫。满怀愤怒和怨恨，好像要去拼命一般。但是……它们也在害怕。它们说，我们正在前往连死亡本身也会消亡的地方。”

languages.text: « Les voix... elles hurlent de rage et crient vengeance, comme si elles se préparaient à la guerre. Mais elles sont effrayées... Elles disent que là où nous allons, c'est la fin de tout, même de la mort. »
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

traits.locale_text: « Les voix... elles hurlent de rage et crient vengeance, comme si elles se préparaient à la guerre. Mais elles sont effrayées... Elles disent que là où nous allons, c'est la fin de tout, même de la mort. »

languages.text: "Fısıltılar... Çığlık atıyorlar. Öfkeyle ve hınçla. Sanki savaşa hazırlanıyorlar. Ama... Korkuyorlar. Bize ölümün ta kendisinin öldüğü yere gittiğimizi söylüyorlar."
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

traits.locale_text: "Fısıltılar... Çığlık atıyorlar. Öfkeyle ve hınçla. Sanki savaşa hazırlanıyorlar. Ama... Korkuyorlar. Bize ölümün ta kendisinin öldüğü yere gittiğimizi söylüyorlar."

languages.text: 「囁き手たちが……叫んでる。怒りと恨みでね。まるで戦に出るみたいに。でも……あの子たちは怯えてる。あたしたちは、死そのものが死ぬ場所へ向かってるんだって」
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."

traits.locale_text: 「囁き手たちが……叫んでる。怒りと恨みでね。まるで戦に出るみたいに。でも……あの子たちは怯えてる。あたしたちは、死そのものが死ぬ場所へ向かってるんだって」

languages.text: "Die Flüsterstimmen ... sie schreien. Wütend und feindselig. Als wären sie auf dem Warpweg. Aber ... sie haben Angst. Sie sagen, wir gehen an den Ort, an dem der Tod selbst stirbt."
languages.original_text: "The whisperers... they're screaming. In rage and resentment. As if they're on the warpath. But... they're afraid. They say we're going where death itself dies."
